description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs (lint, test, publish) using the default stage ordering. The lint job runs on the python:3 image and executes `pip install pre-commit` followed by `pre-commit run --all-files --show-diff-on-failure`. The test job runs on the fedora:latest image, installs python3-pip, python3.6, python3.9, python3.11 via dnf, then installs nox and virtualenv==20.21.1 with pip and finally runs `nox`. The publish job, also on python:3, depends on test and lint, triggers only when `stqe/__about__.py` changes on the default branch of the project `rh-kernel-stqe/python-stqe`, and runs `pip install hatch`, `hatch build`, and `hatch publish` to publish the package.
